title: RNA Isolation from Plant Tissue Protocol 17: Invitrogen PureLink-Qiagen RNeasy Hybrid
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"2m842","text":"Implemented by: Patrick Edger and J. Chris Pires","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"cpqtu","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"cnk9p","text":"For a small number of samples the Invitrogen PureLink™ RNA Mini Kit (Cat #12183-018A) was used to isolate total RNA while the Qiagen RNeasy MinElute Cleanup Kit (Cat #74204) was used to purify and concentrate total RNA. The methods followed the manufacturer’s instructions and thus they are not repeated here.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":45,"length":22},{"key":1,"offset":140,"length":20}],"data":[]},{"key":"83s60","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"edtuf","text":"This protocol is part of a collection of eighteen protocols used to isolate total RNA from plant tissue.
